== Notes for [[Item:Q106498|Q106498]] ==

Source 1: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Uqba

Source 2: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Urwa_bint_Kariz

Source 3: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd-al-Rahman_ibn_Awf

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000021140065578

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
